/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/WEAP/SATERM/SA1: YARA M/SAORD/X: PEACEFUL CONTACT/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCEOR DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/STWPX/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY NOW CHECK IN 2 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE AS OPPOSED TO IN PERSON/CTORD:ACM WILL RECEIVE & SUBMIT TO THE COURT PROGRESS REPORTS ON AA MEETINGS AS WELL AS PARENTING CLASSES/CONTD:ACM PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:ACM/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:DEFENSE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED/X:SUBPOENAED RECORD: ENVELOPE #1 - SUBPOENAED ISSUED BY THE P,D,'S OFFICE TOTHE EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT (CONTAINING CAD)/X:SUBPOENAED RECORD RELEASED TOTHE P,D,'S OFFICE/NTW60/LD: 09-27-21/CONTD: 08-31-21 FOR PHC/CONTD:  09-14-21 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:EST 90 MINS/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TN: ANDREI MOROZOV/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT SHALL ATTEND 1 AA MEETING PER WEEK AND COMPLY WITH THE STAY AWAY ORDER/SAORD/SA1: YARA M/SA2: 1831 BALBOA STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 08-10-21 (10TH)/X: 09-08-21 (30TH)/X: 09-27-21 (60TH)/987,2/TE: 90 MINUTES/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 08-09-21/DOP/
/DAWT/X:RUSSIAN INTERPRETER IS WAIVED TODAY/CAL:PHC AND POSSIBLE DISPO //CONT/DOPU:IF NO DISPO/
